messages.body: Hi. We need a large order but want it split across multiple delivery dates and multiple products.
We can do multiple shipments. What do you need?
KNM Coffee, Assam tea, copy paper, and Red Balloons.
Quantities?
12 bags coffee, 30 boxes tea, 50 reams paper, 3000 balloons.
Coffee $300, tea $360, paper $200, balloons $9k (3x1000). Total $9860.
Can we do three shipments? Coffee first, then tea and paper, then balloons.
Yes. When for shipment 1?
feb 28 — 12 bags coffee only.
Shipment 2?
march 5 — 30 tea, 50 paper. Same address.
Shipment 3?
march 12 — 3000 balloons. But that one goes to Changi Hospital Way Singapore 700339.
So shipments 1 and 2 to one address, shipment 3 to Changi. Correct?
Yes. First two to 100 Finance Ave. Balloons to Changi.
Noted. Can we discuss payment terms — Net 30 from first or last delivery?
From first delivery — feb 28. We're also hoping for a volume discount on the whole order.
For orders above $5k we can do 6%. That would bring total to $9268.40.
What about 8%? We're a long-standing customer and might have more events next year.
I'd need to check. For now I can confirm 6%. I'll come back on 8% by tomorrow.
Okay. Let's lock 6% and you can confirm 8% later. If you can do 8% we might add sanitizer to shipment 2.
Noted. PO number for the main order?
PO-2025-11-301. Invoice to accounts@company.com, copy to procurement.
Noted. Balloons — any specific colour mix or standard mix?
Standard mix is fine. Actually — can we get 1500 red and 1500 white instead?
Yes, we can do that. Same price. I'll note 1500 red, 1500 white.
One more thing — for shipment 2, we might need the paper earlier. Can we move march 5 to march 3?
I'll check warehouse. If we can, I'll confirm and update the DO.
If march 3 doesn't work, keep march 5. Don't split tea and paper.
Understood. One more question — FOB Singapore, our delivery to both addresses. Correct?
Yes. And last time we had a delay on the delivery note for shipment 2. Can you send it on the day?
We've updated our process — you'll get electronic delivery notes on the day for each shipment.
We might add a fourth shipment in april — more coffee and maybe sanitizer. Would the 6% still apply?
We'd look at combined volume. If you place it before march ends we can try to align. We can confirm when you have numbers.
Thanks. And please confirm 8% by tomorrow — if we get it we'll add the sanitizer to shipment 2.
I'll revert on 8% and sanitizer pricing. Good day.
Good day.
8% is available. I'll confirm the sanitizer pricing shortly.
Thanks. I'll add the sanitizer to shipment 3. And let's lock 8% for the whole order.
Pricing for sanitizer is $10 per box.
Confirmed, add 100 boxes to shipment 3.
Noted. I'll send the SO shortly.
Thanks.
